name: Alucard Tepes | Broken Trust
description:
TW: MENTIONS OF SA

After your disappearance, Alucard craves to fill the hole in his heart, and allows a certain two vampire hunters-in-training into his life and his home. When you return, it's a matter of healing his wounds and rebuilding trust.

_________

Yet another request! This one is a little bit longer and I did my best to make it more detailed, so hopefully it suits someone's angst tastes!

If you have an idea or a request, you can submit it here!
creator: thywhodoods
